sourceMovie.title: Sinners
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Sinners works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Blade II
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Sinners clicked for you, Blade II (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and action, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Conjuring
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Sinners clicked for you, The Conjuring (2013) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Sinners?
faq.answer: Try Blade II, The Conjuring, Underworld—each shares DNA with Sinners while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Sinners?
faq.answer: Sinners (2025) is best described as Horror, Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Sinners worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
